commit_sha_note: The final commit SHA is reported in the implementer handoff. A committed evidence file cannot contain its own final SHA without changing that SHA.
summary: Refreshed stale bundler-failure evidence with assertion-level RED controls and current GREEN CT/typecheck/prettier outputs for ProjectSettingsModalContent governance settings.

focusedPrettier.result: All matched files use Prettier code style

rootLint.note: Previous evidence records unrelated Markdown/spec Prettier warnings. This remediation does not claim root pnpm lint passed.

red.negative_control: Temporarily reversed the ProjectSettingsModalContent governance/isAdmin implementation patch.
red.assertion: Admin fixture expected the Permissions & Governance sidebar button to be visible; Playwright failed with element(s) not found.

green.assertion: Admin fixture sees the Permissions & Governance sidebar button.

red.negative_control: Leak control: temporarily forced ProjectSettingsModalContent to pass isAdmin={true} into SettingsModalLayout.
red.assertion: Member fixture expected zero Permissions & Governance buttons; Playwright failed with received count 1.

green.assertion: Member fixture does not see the Permissions & Governance sidebar button.

red.negative_control: Temporarily reversed the ProjectSettingsModalContent governance/isAdmin implementation patch.
red.assertion: Admin governance selection expected the Permissions & Governance heading; Playwright failed with element(s) not found.

green.assertion: Governance selection renders the real Permissions & Governance heading and no not-found fallback.
